text: As I step into this sleek, glass-walled environment, a quiet sense of curiosity washes over me. The presence of others engaged in discussion inside the room draws my attention, yet I am mindful of my separation by this transparent barrier—it feels almost symbolic of being close to but not fully part of the inner circle. There’s anticipation in the electrified air, but also an undercurrent of hesitation. I am both observer and participant, pondering the distance between presence and engagement.
